# Al Khobar Area

**Summary**: A coastal area in the Eastern Province of Saudi Arabia.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2016]] sampled microalgae from Al-Khobar for isolation and characterization.
